title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.220 - Highway patrol records, copies to county — access
text:
66.220.  Highway patrol records, copies to county — access. — The superintendent of the state highway patrol shall cause copies of appropriate records of the patrol pertaining to the violations set out in section 66.200 which occur in the county after October 13, 1963, to be transmitted to the officer or agency responsible for law enforcement in the unincorporated areas of any first class county having a charter form of government, and the state highway patrol shall have access to all records of the county.
(L. 1963 p. 122 § 3)
